items.headline: Claude Opus 4.6 Ships with 1M Context and Adaptive Thinking
items.why_it_matters: First frontier model to offer million-token context at standard pricing — changes how long-horizon agent tasks are built.

items.headline: Exa Launches Deep-Reasoning Search for AI Agents
items.why_it_matters: Multi-step reasoning over live web data at query time — unlocks research agents that actually cite sources.

items.headline: Mistral Raises $1.2B Series C at $15B Valuation
items.why_it_matters: Largest European AI funding round — signals open-weight models remain a credible counterweight to US frontier labs.
